title: Excalibur | Epic Knights Support
description: This is an unofficial WIP compatibility pack to make the textures in the Epic Knights series mods blend together with the incredible Excalibur texture pack.
body:
This is an **unofficial WIP** compatibility pack to make the textures in the whole [**Epic Knights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons) series mods, made by Magistu, blend together with the incredible [**Excalibur**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) texture pack.

## Features
- All weapons adapted to fit Excalibur
- All shields from the original mod adapted to fit Excalibur
- All ingots adapted to fit Excalibur

It currently contains:

- [Epic Knights: Shields Armor and Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-shields-armor-and-weapons)
- [Epic Knights: Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-knights-addon)
- [Epic Knights: Ores and Alloys](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-knights-ores-and-alloys/)

## Excalibur Community & Credits 

### Join the community

Have a bug to report?
An idea to share?
Or just want to chat about Excalibur?

[Join the Official Excalibur Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qYZ9Pen)

_Adventure awaits — and every voice shapes the journey!_

### Credits

Special thanks to the amazing creators who made this addon possible:

- [Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/user/Maffhew/resourcepacks) – Creator of _Excalibur_
- [Magistu](https://modrinth.com/user/Magistu) – Creator of the whole _Epic Knights_ series
- [StaxiHD](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/staxihd/followers) – Creator of _Epic Knights: Ores and Alloys_


## Licensing

Excalibur | Epic Knights Support is a fan-made pack, shared under the terms of Excalibur’s license.

**In accordance with Excalibur's licensing:**

- You may not redistribute this pack and claim it as your own.
- You may not redistribute this pack without a link to this thread.
- You may not put money-making links such as adf.ly links with this work under any circumstances.
- You may not use this work for commercial purposes.
- You may not alter, transform, or build upon this work.
- You may use this pack as a part of any Minecraft-related video including those which are created for commercial purposes or are monetized by advertising.

_Any of the above conditions can be waived if you get permission from Matthew (Maffhew) Dillow._
